title: Sterilizing immunity
script_summary: Explaining the concept of sterilizing immunity and its implications in a captivating way.

segments.voiceover: Here's what science actually says about sterilizing immunity.
Sterilizing immunity means complete protection against infection. But how does it really work?
When your body fights off a virus, it can develop this immunity. But it’s not always guaranteed.
Some vaccines can provide sterilizing immunity, meaning they stop the virus from replicating.
But emerging research shows not all infections trigger this. It’s a complex game.
Want to unlock more secrets of immunity? Hit like and follow for more science!
